promptTemplate: A visually stunning {{cinematic_style}} sequence. The camera initiates a {{camera_movement}}, perfectly timed with a {{focal_transition}} to draw the viewer's eye. The inherent life of the scene is revealed through {{subject_dynamism}}, grounded by {{environmental_motion}} interacting with the surroundings. The atmosphere is structurally transformed by {{lighting_evolution}}, culminating in a masterful display of {{vfx_overlay}}. The entire sequence maintains a cohesive {{creative_intention}}, engineered for fluid motion and absolute visual fidelity.

values.text: rack focus shifting elegantly from foreground to background
constant razor-sharp, deep depth of field
softening of the edges into a dreamy, shallow bokeh
sudden, sharp focus pull to a hidden detail
split-diopter effect keeping two visual planes in sharp focus
organic flowing motion of fabric and hair
a slow, dramatic transformation of posture
subtle wind rustling through the available elements
dust motes and particles lazily drifting through the air
water and liquid dynamics flowing naturally
thick rolling fog or smoke slowly overtaking the frame
time-lapse speed revealing rapid environmental changes
enhanced natural lighting that elevates the existing shadows
a shift towards a warm, nostalgic golden hour glow
volumetric light rays piercing through the atmosphere
the sudden appearance of sharp, dramatic chiaroscuro shadows
a gradual desaturation into an austere, muted palette
a strobe-like flickering of failing light sources
authentic 35mm film grain and subtle halation
crystalline lens flares glinting off highlights
subtle chromatic aberration strictly on the edges
semi-transparent holographic elements overlaying the view

tags.label: Universal Img2Vid Cinematographer
tags.description: A template specifically designed to animate ANY uploaded image by abstracting away the subject matter and injecting powerful directorial and camera/lighting instructions.
